name: rl-protect-skills
description: Supply chain security skills for rl-protect. Scan dependencies for malware, vulnerabilities, and policy violations before they enter your project.

plugins.name: rl-protect-install
plugins.description: Installs the rl-protect CLI from PyPI and configures it for first use. Use when setting up rl-protect for the first time or when rl-protect is not found on PATH.

plugins.name: rl-protect-connect
plugins.description: Connects rl-protect to a Spectra Assure Community or Enterprise Portal account. Use when setting up rl-protect, adding or updating a server connection, or providing an API token.

plugins.name: rl-protect-scan
plugins.description: Scans packages and manifest files for supply chain risk before dependency changes are made. Use when adding packages, updating versions, or editing manifest files.

plugins.name: rl-protect-interpret
plugins.description: Interprets rl-protect JSON reports to answer questions about vulnerabilities, malware, behavior indicators, policy violations, overrides, governance blocks, and dependency graphs.

plugins.name: rl-protect-edit-profile
plugins.description: Creates and modifies rl-protect scanning profiles. Use when configuring assessment severity levels, adding governance allow/block rules, or managing policy overrides.
